declared_losses_before_artifact: The 0.10 quality margin is declared, not learned from data, so non-inferiority claims are bounded by that threshold rather than empirically derived.
Scheduler observability is reported separately from artifact quality; the framework does not support claims that couple the two into a single composite judgment.
Provider or transport failures render runs inconclusive — they cannot be interpreted as evidence of model inferiority, only as gaps in the comparison record.
declared_losses_in_artifact: The 0.10 quality margin is declared, not learned from data, so non-inferiority claims are bounded by that threshold rather than empirically derived.
Scheduler observability is reported separately from artifact quality; the framework does not support claims that couple the two into a single composite judgment.
Provider or transport failures render runs inconclusive — they cannot be interpreted as evidence of model inferiority, only as gaps in the comparison record.
